hero_badge: White-Labeled DBaaS for Cloud Service Providers
hero_description: Built on ACE (AppsCode Cloud Engine) - a fully managed, white-labeled, production-ready Database-as-a-Service platform that exceeds public cloud offerings while maintaining complete branding control and data sovereignty.
when_to_use_description: Everything you need to compete with global hyperscalers

when_to_use.title: Complete Branding Control
when_to_use.description: Full branding with data sovereignty and white-label control

when_to_use.title: Usage-Based Licensing
when_to_use.description: Predictable costs aligned to your revenue growth

when_to_use.title: Fastest Time-to-Market
when_to_use.description: 30 days from signing to production go-live

when_to_use.title: 24×7 Enterprise Support
when_to_use.description: Defined SLAs with comprehensive training included

platform_built_for_scale_subtitle: Production-ready features that exceed public cloud offerings

platform_built_for_scale.title: Provisioning & Lifecycle
platform_built_for_scale.description: Instant self-service launch via web portal, CLI, API, kubectl. Fully automated lifecycle: provisioning, upgrades, scaling, failover, repair, halt/resume.

platform_built_for_scale.title: High Availability & Resilience
platform_built_for_scale.description: Multi-AZ/multi-zone clustering with automatic failover and data replication. Continuous health checks with protection against accidental deletion.

platform_built_for_scale.title: Scaling & Storage
platform_built_for_scale.description: Horizontal and vertical scaling with zero downtime. Dynamic volume expansion with full history tracking including initial size, expansions, and timestamps.

platform_built_for_scale.title: Backup & Disaster Recovery
platform_built_for_scale.description: Policy-driven scheduled & on-demand backups to S3-compatible storage. Incremental, deduplicated, encrypted backups with snapshot lifecycle management.

platform_built_for_scale.title: Monitoring & Observability
platform_built_for_scale.description: OpenTelemetry collectors for end-user monitoring. Metrics in Thanos, logs & tracing in ClickHouse. Tenant-isolated Grafana and Perses dashboards.

platform_built_for_scale.title: Security & Compliance
platform_built_for_scale.description: Automated TLS/SSL via cert-manager. Transparent Data Encryption (TDE). RBAC, Pod Security Policies, Network Policies, Vault integration.

billing_and_metering_subtitle: Real-time API access for accurate monthly client invoices with detailed usage tracking

billing_features.title: Real-Time Metering API
billing_features.description: Access all required data with UTC timestamps

billing_features.title: Database Level Metrics
billing_features.description: Pod flavor (CPU/Memory), pod age, pod count (including autoscaling)

billing_features.title: Storage Tracking
billing_features.description: Volume name, initial size, expansion history (size + timestamp), creation/deletion timestamps

billing_features.title: Usage Calculation
billing_features.description: Sustained GiB RAM (730 hours/month) for accurate billing

billing_features.title: Seamless Integration
billing_features.description: RESTful and gRPC APIs for your billing platform

platform_features_subtitle: All components are containerized, CRD-driven, and designed for multi-cluster and multi-region deployments

platform_features.title: KubeDB Platform
platform_features.description: Web Console, Envoy Gateway, Hub/Spoke Model, and Policy Engine for complete DBaaS management

platform_features.title: KubeDB Operator
platform_features.description: Automated provisioning, operations, autoscaling, backup/restore, and database migration

platform_features.title: Kubernetes Services
platform_features.description: ArgoCD, Open Cluster Management, Cert Manager, Prometheus, and Grafana integration

platform_features.title: Kubernetes Platform
platform_features.description: Support for OpenShift, Rancher, EKS, GKE, AKS, and any CNCF-certified Kubernetes

platform_features.title: Infrastructure
platform_features.description: Deploy on-premises, in the cloud, or at the edge with complete flexibility

messages_subtitle: Beautiful, fully branded self-service portal with complete REST APIs for native integration into your cloud console. No requirement to expose KubeDB Platform UI directly - integrate seamlessly into your existing customer experience.
universal_access_subtitle: Your customers' databases are accessible from anywhere - modern cloud-native apps and legacy VM-based applications alike

universal_access_cards.title: Inside Kubernetes
universal_access_cards.description: Cloud-native applications running in the same K8s cluster

universal_access_cards.title: Outside Kubernetes
universal_access_cards.description: External applications via load balancers and ingress

universal_access_cards.title: Legacy VM Applications
universal_access_cards.description: Traditional applications running on virtual machines

universal_access_message_body: Your customers can connect from containerized microservices, serverless functions, traditional monoliths on VMs, or external SaaS applications - all using standard database protocols. No special clients or SDKs required.
why_kubedb_subtitle: Expand your portfolio with managed database services

why_kubedb_features.title: System Integrators

faqs.question: What is ACE (AppsCode Cloud Engine)?
faqs.answer: ACE is a fully managed, white-labeled, production-ready Database-as-a-Service platform built on KubeDB. It provides complete infrastructure for CSPs and MSPs to offer managed database services with their own branding, billing, and data sovereignty.

faqs.question: Which Kubernetes distributions are supported?
faqs.answer: ACE supports any CNCF-certified Kubernetes distribution including OpenShift, Rancher, EKS, GKE, AKS, and on-premises clusters. It's fully compatible with private registry deployments and air-gapped environments.

faqs.question: Can I integrate with my existing billing system?
faqs.answer: Yes. ACE provides comprehensive real-time metering APIs (REST and gRPC) that can be integrated into any existing billing platform, ERP system, or marketplace.

faqs.question: How quickly can we go live?
faqs.answer: The standard timeline is 30 days from signing to production go-live. This includes deployment progression through Dev, Staging, and Production environments with our expert support team.

faqs.question: Do you support white-labeled UI and documentation?
faqs.answer: Yes. ACE is fully white-labeled including the self-service UI, CLI output, and documentation. You can customize colors, logos, and content to match your brand identity.

faqs.question: What about data sovereignty and compliance?
faqs.answer: ACE ensures complete data sovereignty, all customer data remains in your infrastructure. It supports encryption at rest, RBAC, network policies, audit logging, and integrations with compliance frameworks.

cta_description: Compete with global hyperscalers with your own branded database services
